constraints: validates required fields for active tab
submit_actions.on_validation_error: shows inline errors on invalid fields

on_success_by_tab.Hotels: redirects to Hotels results listing page
on_success_by_tab.Flights: redirects to Flights results listing page
on_success_by_tab.Tours: redirects to Tours results listing page
on_success_by_tab.Cars: redirects to Cars results listing page

submit_actions.on_success: creates account; either automatically logs in and redirects to dashboard, or prompts user to verify email before gaining access

constraints: may be required after multiple consecutive failed attempts

submit_actions.on_success: redirects to dashboard or original requested page
submit_actions.on_failure: shows invalid credentials error and clears Password field and increments Failed_Login_Attempts
constraints: if CAPTCHA is visible then valid CAPTCHA response is required

actions.on_success: redirects to dashboard or original requested page
redirects to dashboard or original requested page

submit_actions.on_success: sends reset link to that address and shows confirmation message
submit_actions.on_failure: shows error and form remains editable

preconditions: reset link must not be expired
submit_actions.on_success: updates password and redirects to login page with success message
submit_actions.on_failure: shows error and keeps password fields editable

Active_Filters_Summary.description: Shows currently active filters with individual remove actions

item_actions.on_success: removes this filter and updates results

controls.on_success: clears all filters and updates results

Hotels_Card_List.note: Each card displays hotel details (non-interactive display fields omitted from AST)

item_actions.on_success: initiates booking flow for selected hotel

row_actions.on_success: reveals booking form and populates Selected_Hotel and Selected_Room_Type
expands result to show baggage allowance, fare rules, and seat availability

constraints: all required fields must be present and valid

submit_actions.on_failure: inline errors displayed and progression blocked

Vehicle_Listings.notes: Each listing displays make/model, transmission, fuel policy, seating, luggage, features, price per day and total cost for the selected period (display-only, not represented here).

constraints: must be a valid email address

Review_Terms.on_click: displays terms covering fuel policy, mileage limits, damage liability, and cancellation

constraints: must be checked to enable Confirm Booking
invalid fields show inline errors and block progression
invalid fields show inline errors and block progression

submit_actions.on_success: shows visa requirements (visa type, processing time, required documents, fees) for the selected Nationality and Destination Country
creates visa application in Pending status and lists the application in Bookings dashboard

row_actions.on_success: opens application detail for tracking status

My_Bookings.description: Table of user's past and upcoming bookings (interactive row actions are defined in row_state_actions)

Wallet_Credits.description: Transaction history (available credit balance is a read-only value and not represented here)

Reviews.description: Listings of completed bookings eligible for review

submit_actions.on_success: applies requested modifications, charges applicable fees as needed, updates booking, and sends modification email notification

Refund_Amount.note: value is calculated based on cancellation policy and applicable fees

submit_actions.on_success: processes cancellation, initiates refund to the original payment method, changes booking status to Cancelled, and sends cancellation email notification
redirects to Booking Confirmation page with reference number
submit_actions.on_failure: displays an error message describing the issue and allows retry without losing booking details

on_change_actions.on_success: updates all prices across the site in real-time without losing the user's current search context
saves selected currency to authenticated user's profile
stores selected currency in session/cookie for the current browsing session
switches entire site interface including navigation labels, form labels, and content to the chosen language
applies layout direction change for languages that require it (e.g., RTL for Arabic)
saves selected language to authenticated user's profile
stores selected language in session/cookie for the current browsing session
